data.title: BOYD GAMING REPORTS FIRST-QUARTER 2026 RESULTS
data.description: In their latest update on April 23, 2026, Boyd Gaming Corporation (NYSE: BYD) announced their financial performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. Keith Smith, who serves as the President and Chief Executive Officer of Boyd Gaming, shared his insights on the results. The report highlighted key figures and outcomes of the company's operations during this period, signaling positive outcomes and growth prospects.

data.title: ROBERT HALF REPORTS FIRST-QUARTER FINANCIAL RESULTS
data.description: On April 23, 2026, Robert Half Inc. (NYSE: RHI) based in Menlo Park, California, released their financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The net income for this period was $14 million, equivalent to $0.14 per share, achieved from revenues totaling $1.300 billion.

data.title: MAGYAR BANCORP, INC. ANNOUNCES SECOND QUARTER FINANCIAL RESULTS AND DECLARES DIVIDEND
data.description: In a recent announcement, Magyar Bancorp (NASDAQ: MGYR) based in New Brunswick, N.J., disclosed its financial results for the three and six months concluding on March 31, 2026. The parent company of Magyar Bank revealed a notable 13% growth in net income during the three-month period.

data.title: FIRST FINANCIAL BANKSHARES TO LIVE STREAM ANNUAL MEETING ON TUESDAY, APRIL 28, 2026
data.description: A financial institution based in Abilene, Texas, First Financial Bankshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIN), has announced its plans to conduct the 2026 Annual Shareholders' Meeting on April 28, 2026, at 10:30 a.m. Central time. This meeting will be available for live streaming to enable wider access. Attendees will have the opportunity to hear from key executives like F. Scott Dueser, the Executive Chairman, and David.

data.title: Natural Grocers by Vitamin Cottage, Inc. Announces Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: On April 23, 2026, Natural Grocers by Vitamin Cottage, Inc. shared that they will unveil their financial performance for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026 on May 7, 2026, after the market closes. The announcement will be made following the release via the wire.

(NASDAQ: TRIP) disclosed that on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 7:05am ET, the company will publish its financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2026 on its dedicated investor relations page at ir.tripadvisor.com. data.title: SouthState Bank Corporation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results, Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: Winter Haven, Florida - SouthState Bank Corporation, also known as SouthState, shared its unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The report covers the period ended on March 31, 2026. SouthState is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SSB. The company announced the results on April 23, 2026. The financial report indicates the performance of SouthState Bank Corporation over the three-month period, highlighting key numbers and information for investors and stakeholders. "SouthState opened the year with..." was the opening statement disclosed by the company.

data.title: Genpact Limited Board Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: On April 23, 2026, Genpact (NYSE: G), a leading technology solutions company known for industry expertise and advanced capabilities, declared a cash dividend of $0.1875 per share. This decision was made by the company's board of directors.

data.title: iTonic Holdings Ltd Granted An Extension of Additional 180-Day by Nasdaq to Regain Compliance with Minimum Bid Price Rule
data.description: iTonic Holdings Ltd, a healthcare solution provider specializing in brachytherapy treatment planning systems, announced that Nasdaq approved their request for a 180-calendar day extension, until October 19, 2026, to comply with the minimum closing bid price requirement under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). The company received notification on April 21, 2026, following the expiration of the initial compliance period on April 20, 2026.

data.title: Absci to Report Business Updates and First Quarter 2026 Financial and Operating Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: Absci Corporation, a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ABSI, is set to release its first quarter 2026 financial and operating results on May 7, 2026. The company, known for utilizing generative AI to develop innovative therapeutics, will provide business updates along with the financial details. The report is scheduled to be released after the market closes on the specified date. This announcement came out of the offices in Vancouver and New York on April 23, 2026.

data.title: AbbVie Provides Update on TrenibotulinumtoxinE (TrenibotE) Biologics License Application in the U.S.
data.description: The FDA has issued a Complete Response Letter (CRL) to AbbVie regarding manufacturing processes for trenibotulinumtoxinE (TrenibotE). No further clinical studies are required. AbbVie, a key player in neurotoxin development, faces this setback but remains well-equipped to handle the situation with its expertise in manufacturing.

data.title: HubSpot to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: Cambridge-based company HubSpot, known for its customer platform, will release its first quarter 2026 financial results after the U.S. financial markets close on Thursday, May 7, 2026. A conference call is scheduled for 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day, during which the company will review the financial results and provide insights into its business operations and outlook for the quarter.
